column1: # All problems in this set are known to be INFEASIBLE (primal infeasible).
# Purpose: verify that the solver correctly detects infeasibility (PASS:Infeasible)
#   rather than returning Optimal or Timeout.
# optimal_obj column: INFEASIBLE means primal infeasible (no feasible solution exists)
# Solver should return SolveStatus::Infeasible for PASS.
# Note: These problems were originally collected by Gay (1993) and are standard
# benchmarks for testing infeasibility detection (IIS analysis
